DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT RHODENA MIXON DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Cross-Complaint states facts in support of the causes of action asserted. No authority is cited for the proposition that litigation privilege applies to the enforcement of the contracts/offers/settlement agreements etc. Whether the settlement agreement/contract/offer in this action was enforceable or not (e.g. no meeting of the minds) is an issue of fact not appropriate for determination at this stage of the litigation. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
